name: hybrid-mobile-architecture
description: Scaffold, extend, and maintain applications built on the Prometheus AGS hybrid mobile architecture: Flutter + Rust FFI for iOS/Android, Tauri + React 19 for desktop, sharing a single gen_ui_core Rust crate. Covers environment setup, feature-based clean architecture, Riverpod and Zustand + Prometheus Entity Management 3.x state management, TanStack Router/Table, Ory Kratos/Supabase auth, A2UI/AG-UI protocols, local inference, MCP tool use, SurrealDB integration, and UAR embedding.
